THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILKINSON, ERIC WILLIAM $2,401.70 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,401.70, COSTS PER COST BILL.

#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS - C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; ROLL CALL OF ALL PROSP. JURORS & SWORN; COURT & PLTF. VOIR; PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES EXERCISED BY BOTH SIDES; 12 MEMBERS OF THE JURY & 1 ALTERNATE SWORN TO TRY THE CASE. CONT. TO 3/22/95 AT 9:30AM.

JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. JURY DELIBERATION CONT'D. ALL PARTIES, BOTH COUNSEL AND JURORS PRESENT. JURY RETURNED TO COURT. JURY HAS REACHED A VERDICT. VERDICT READ INTO THE RECORD BY CLERK AND FILED. VERDICT WAS 9 IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF. AND 3 AGAINST. JURY POOLED AT REQUEST OF PLTF. VERDICT WAS 9 IN FAVOR AND 3 AGAINST. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
